subtopics: 1-D DP $\cdot$ Unbounded Knapsack $\cdot$ LIS $\cdot$ Tracking Min/Max Simultaneously

blocks.content: **Climbing Stairs.** You can climb 1 or 2 steps at a time. How many distinct ways to reach step $n$?
**House Robber.** Given an array of non-negative integers \texttt{nums}, you cannot rob two adjacent houses. Return the maximum amount you can rob.
**Coin Change.** Given coin denominations and a target \texttt{amount}, return the minimum number of coins to make the amount, or $-1$ if impossible.
**Coin Change 2.** Return the number of distinct combinations of coins that sum to \texttt{amount} (coins can be reused; order does not matter).
**Word Break.** Given a string \texttt{s} and a list of words \texttt{wordDict}, return \texttt{True} if \texttt{s} can be segmented into a sequence of dictionary words.
**Longest Increasing Subsequence (LIS).** Return the length of the longest strictly increasing subsequence of \texttt{nums}. Achieve $O(n\log n)$ time.
**Maximum Product Subarray.** Return the maximum product of a contiguous subarray of \texttt{nums}.
